title: Check If Word Is Valid After Substitutions
hints: Notice that any valid string must contain the substring 'abc'. What happens if you remove one instance of 'abc' from the string?
Repeatedly removing any occurrence of 'abc' from the string preserves its validity. Can you keep doing this until no 'abc' remains?
If the string is valid, repeatedly removing 'abc' substrings will eventually reduce it to an empty string. Use a stack to simulate this removal process efficiently.
